title: ArmDef Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function ArmDef (ArmNumber As Integer) As Boolean
parameters: ArmNumber	Integer expression from 1-15.    Arm 0 is the standard (default) robot arm and is always defined.  Arm(s) 1-15 are auxiliary arms defined by using the ArmSet method.
description: Returns if a robot arm is defined.
see_also:
ArmSet, GetArm, Tool

ArmDef Example

VB Example:

x = m_spel.ArmDef(1)

C# Example:

x = m_spel.ArmDef(1);
